languages.text: "Потопление станции повлечет за собой катастрофическое падение выработки прометия — ее полную остановку — что в свою очередь приведет к полной остановке производства. Такой исход экстремально неоптимален — святотатственен. Сценарий также предполагает — гарантирует — массовые сопутствующие потери среди человеко-единиц, в настоящий момент обеспечивающих бесперебойное функционирование комплекса Тиркуаз-4 — ее рабочих. Данные потери нежелательны — и крайне прискорбны".

traits.locale_text: "Встревоженно: к тому же, разрушение систем станции повлечет за собой значительные потери среди рядовых работников. Такой исход экстремально неоптимален, принимая во внимание важную роль этих единиц в обеспечении функционирования платформ".

languages.text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

Данные потери нежелательны — и крайне прискорбны".

This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

"Clarification: the sinking of the station would cause significant casualties among the rank and file. This outcome would be extremely suboptimal, given these units' important role in the operation of the station's promethium extraction mechanisms."

languages.text: 「補足：基地の沈没は、一般兵の大きな犠牲につながる。この結果、基地のプルームテウム抽出装置の運用において重要な役割を果たすこれらの部隊にとって、非常に望ましくない結果となるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Clarification: the sinking of the station would cause significant casualties among the rank and file. This outcome would be extremely suboptimal, given these units' important role in the operation of the station's promethium extraction mechanisms."

traits.locale_text: 「補足：基地の沈没は、一般兵の大きな犠牲につながる。この結果、基地のプルームテウム抽出装置の運用において重要な役割を果たすこれらの部隊にとって、非常に望ましくない結果となるだろう。」

languages.text: "İstasyonun batması; prometyum çıkarma hacminde feci bir düşüşe, yani tamamen durmasına neden olacak. Bu da sırayla üretimi durma noktasına getirecektir. Bu sonuç son derece saygısızca bir şekilde verimsiz olacaktır. Bu senaryo, aynı zamanda şu anda Tirkuaz-4 tesisinin işçilerinin sürekli çalışmasını sağlayan insan birimleri arasında büyük ikincil kayıplara işaret etmektedir. Böylesi kayıplar yaşanmasını istemeyiz. Bu, son derece üzücü olur."
languages.original_text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

traits.locale_text: "İstasyonun batması; prometyum çıkarma hacminde feci bir düşüşe, yani tamamen durmasına neden olacak. Bu da sırayla üretimi durma noktasına getirecektir. Bu sonuç son derece saygısızca bir şekilde verimsiz olacaktır. Bu senaryo, aynı zamanda şu anda Tirkuaz-4 tesisinin işçilerinin sürekli çalışmasını sağlayan insan birimleri arasında büyük ikincil kayıplara işaret etmektedir. Böylesi kayıplar yaşanmasını istemeyiz. Bu, son derece üzücü olur."

languages.text: «El hundimiento de la estación causaría un declive catastrófico en el volumen de extracción de prometio, cesando por completo el proceso y deteniendo la producción. El resultado sería extremadamente subóptimo, prácticamente blasfemo. El escenario también implicaría y garantizaría bajas colaterales tremendas entre las unidades humanas que aseguran el funcionamiento de la instalación Tirkuaz-4: sus trabajadores. Las pérdidas serían indeseables y lamentables».
languages.original_text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

traits.locale_text: «El hundimiento de la estación causaría un declive catastrófico en el volumen de extracción de prometio, cesando por completo el proceso y deteniendo la producción. El resultado sería extremadamente subóptimo, prácticamente blasfemo. El escenario también implicaría y garantizaría bajas colaterales tremendas entre las unidades humanas que aseguran el funcionamiento de la instalación Tirkuaz-4: sus trabajadores. Las pérdidas serían indeseables y lamentables».

languages.text: “如果这座星站沉没，钷素的开采量将出现灾难性下滑，甚至完全停滞，进而导致生产全面瘫痪。这种结果极其不理想，甚至堪称亵渎。这种情况还意味着，或者说注定了目前保障提库阿兹4号设施持续运作的人类单元——即那里的工人——会出现大规模连带伤亡。如此损失既不合期望，也极其令人遗憾。”
languages.original_text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

traits.locale_text: “如果这座星站沉没，钷素的开采量将出现灾难性下滑，甚至完全停滞，进而导致生产全面瘫痪。这种结果极其不理想，甚至堪称亵渎。这种情况还意味着，或者说注定了目前保障提库阿兹4号设施持续运作的人类单元——即那里的工人——会出现大规模连带伤亡。如此损失既不合期望，也极其令人遗憾。”

languages.text: « Le naufrage de la station entraînerait une chute catastrophique de la quantité de prométhium extraite, et par extension, l'arrêt complet des opérations, ce qui interromprait la production. Cette conséquence serait extrêmement sous-optimale, si ce n'est blasphématoire. Ce scénario suggère... garantit... également d'immenses pertes collatérales parmi les unités humaines actuellement chargées d'assurer le bon fonctionnement du complexe Tirkuaz-4, à savoir : ses ouvriers. Ces pertes ne sont pas recommandées et seraient même regrettables. »
languages.original_text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."

traits.locale_text: « Le naufrage de la station entraînerait une chute catastrophique de la quantité de prométhium extraite, et par extension, l'arrêt complet des opérations, ce qui interromprait la production. Cette conséquence serait extrêmement sous-optimale, si ce n'est blasphématoire. Ce scénario suggère... garantit... également d'immenses pertes collatérales parmi les unités humaines actuellement chargées d'assurer le bon fonctionnement du complexe Tirkuaz-4, à savoir : ses ouvriers. Ces pertes ne sont pas recommandées et seraient même regrettables. »

languages.text: "Das Sinken der Station würde einen katastrophalen Rückgang der Promethiumförderung nach sich ziehen — sie käme vollständig zum Erliegen — und das würde wiederum die Produktion zum Stillstand bringen. Dieses Resultat wäre extrem — blasphemisch — suboptimal. Überdies suggeriert — garantiert — dieses Szenario umfassende Kollateralschäden unter den menschlichen Einheiten, die derzeit den kontinuierlichen Betrieb der Tirkuaz-4-Einrichtung gewährleisten — ihre Arbeiter. Derartige Verluste wären nicht wünschenswert — und ausgesprochen bedauerlich."
languages.original_text: "The sinking of the station would cause a catastrophic decline in promethium extraction volumes — its complete cessation — which in turn would bring production to a halt. This outcome would be extremely — blasphemously — suboptimal. This scenario also suggests — guarantees — extensive collateral casualties among the human units currently ensuring the continuous operation of the Tirkuaz-4 facility — its workers. Such losses would be undesirable — and highly regrettable."
